mapper.insert: INSERT INTO egg_group( id, name ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name} )

INSERT INTO pokemon_species( id, name, sort_order, gender_rate, is_baby, is_legendary, is_mythical, category, generation ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{genderRate}, #{isBaby}, #{isLegendary}, #{isMythical}, #{category}, #{generation} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
INSERT INTO pokemon_description( version_id, pokemon_species_id, description ) VALUES( #{versionId}, #{pokemonSpeciesId}, #{description} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
INSERT INTO pokemon_species_egg_group_map( egg_group_id, pokemon_species_id ) VALUES( #{eggGroupId}, #{pokemonSpeciesId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
